intro: Cystium pseudocicer, also known as bladder pod, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and modulating the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Cystium pseudocicer include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
